<!-- Please use this template for pull requests -->

## Summary
A short (1-3 sentence) description of what this PR changes and why.

## Changes
- Bullet list of the important changes in this PR.

## Verification
- How did you verify the change? (local build, tests, manual steps)

## Checklist
- [ ] My change includes tests, or tests were not relevant
- [ ] I updated README or documentation when required
- [ ] CI passes (tests/build)

## Notes
- Anything else the reviewers should know.
